testcase.name: Admin Schedule Change — Conflict Prompt (Story 20.3) › AC3 — Schedule Management page loads without errors @smoke @functional
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › admin-schedule-conflict-prompt.spec.ts:36:7 › Admin Schedule Change — Conflict Prompt (Story 20.3) › AC3 — Schedule Management page loads without errors @smoke @functional
Error: expect(page).not.toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected pattern: not /login/ Received string: "http://localhost:8080/public/login.php" Timeout: 15000ms
Call log: - Expect "not toHaveURL" with timeout 15000ms 19 × unexpected value "http://localhost:8080/public/login.php"
35 | 36 | test('AC3 — Schedule Management page loads without errors @smoke @functional', async ({ page }) => { > 37 | await expect(page).not.toHaveURL(/login/); | ^ 38 | await expect(page.locator('h1')).toContainText('Schedule Management'); 39 | await expect(page.locator('.alert-danger')).toHaveCount(0); 40 | }); at /Users/Mike.Oconnell/IdeaProjects/league-manager/tests/e2e/admin-schedule-conflict-prompt.spec.ts:37:28

testcase.name: Admin Schedule Change — Conflict Prompt (Story 20.3) › AC3 — Process Schedule Change button opens the direct-change modal @smoke @functional
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › admin-schedule-conflict-prompt.spec.ts:42:7 › Admin Schedule Change — Conflict Prompt (Story 20.3) › AC3 — Process Schedule Change button opens the direct-change modal @smoke @functional
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('button').filter({ hasText: 'Process Schedule Change' }) Expected: visible Timeout: 15000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator('button').filter({ hasText: 'Process Schedule Change' })

testcase.name: Admin Schedule Change — Conflict Prompt (Story 20.3) › AC1/AC2 — Conflict warning block contains required elements when visible @functional
testcase.system-out: ℹ️ No conflict warning on page — test data may not have conflicting games. Skipping assertion.

testcase.name: Admin Schedule Change — Conflict Prompt (Story 20.3) › AC2 — Direct change confirm form contains conflict_confirmed=1 hidden field @functional
testcase.system-out: ℹ️ Conflict warning not present — skipping confirm-form structure assertion.

testcase.name: Admin Schedule Change — Conflict Prompt (Story 20.3) › AC4 — Page renders without conflict warning on a clean GET @functional
Admin Schedule Change — Conflict Prompt (Story 20.3) › AC5 — Go Back link returns to a clean Schedule Management page @functional
testcase.system-out: ℹ️ No warning block to test Go Back from — skipping.

testcase.name: Admin Schedule Change — Conflict Prompt (Story 20.3) › AC6 — Multiple conflicts render as separate bullet points @functional
testcase.system-out: ℹ️ No conflict warning present — AC6 multi-bullet check skipped.

testcase.name: Admin Schedule Change — Conflict Prompt (Story 20.3) › Warning text does not contain the coach-facing review suffix @security @functional
testcase.system-out: ℹ️ No conflict warning — coach suffix check skipped.

testcase.name: Admin Schedule Change — Conflict Prompt (Story 20.3) › conflict_confirmed in querystring does not trigger a save on GET @security
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › admin-schedule-conflict-prompt.spec.ts:172:7 › Admin Schedule Change — Conflict Prompt (Story 20.3) › conflict_confirmed in querystring does not trigger a save on GET @security Error: expect(locator).toContainText(expected) failed Locator: locator('h1') Expected substring: "Schedule Management" Received string: "Welcome to District 8 Travel League" Timeout: 15000ms Call log: - Expect "toContainText" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator('h1') 19 × locator resolved to

Welcome to District 8 Travel League

- unexpected value "Welcome to District 8 Travel League" 173 | await page.goto('/admin/schedules/index.php?conflict_confirmed=1'); 174 | await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle'); > 175 | await expect(page.locator('h1')).toContainText('Schedule Management'); | ^ 176 | await expect(page.locator('.alert-success')).toHaveCount(0); 177 | }); 178 | at /Users/Mike.Oconnell/IdeaProjects/league-manager/tests/e2e/admin-schedule-conflict-prompt.spec.ts:175:38 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../reports/artifacts/admin-schedule-conflict-pr-a6375-gger-a-save-on-GET-security-chromium/test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../reports/artifacts/admin-schedule-conflict-pr-a6375-gger-a-save-on-GET-security-chromium/video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ../reports/artifacts/admin-schedule-conflict-pr-a6375-gger-a-save-on-GET-security-chromium/error-context.md

testcase.failure:
